title: Capture flywheel: tiered auto-promote + felt recall format
summary: Two changes mcp/kernel.ts, mcp/cli.ts addressing the "captured memory sits inert in pending / value reads as vanity" adoption problem flagged by an external review. 1 AUTO PROMOTE in distillSession's annotate : a distill
body:
Two changes (mcp/kernel.ts, mcp/cli.ts) addressing the "captured memory sits inert in pending / value reads as vanity" adoption problem flagged by an external review. (1) AUTO-PROMOTE in distillSession's annotate(): a distilled draft is written straight to approved/recallable memory (not the pending inbox) only when AUTO_PROMOTE_ENABLED (env KAGE_AUTO_PROMOTE!=0) AND mode is auto AND evaluateMemoryAdmission class==="high_signal" AND every cited path exists (code-grounded) AND duplicateCandidates()===0 AND detectContradictions()===0. Everything else stays pending for review. KEY INSIGHT that corrected an earlier wrong call this session: verification != human review — auto-promoting a GROUNDED high-signal packet is still verified (citations checked at write, stale-withheld at recall), so it does NOT break the trust wedge; only the human-review gate is removed for clearly-good grounded learnings. Contradictions/duplicates/path-less/low-signal are explicitly held (high-impact -> review). The existing "auto distill writes pending drafts" test stays green because its candidate is a path-less command runbook (not grounded). (2) FELT RECALL FORMAT in recall context_block: entries now read "Team memory: <title>" + summary + "(decided|fixed|noted <date> · cited files)" instead of "[type|scope|confidence]/Why matched/Source" machinery; the prompt-context injection drops the gameable tokens-saved number for "N verified team memories above — follow them" + the stale-withheld trust signal (tokens/$ stays in kage gains). Verified: 352 unit + 12 dogfood pass; live — grounded high-signal -> promoted+recallable, contradiction/duplicate/path-less -> pending, recall shows felt format.
Evidence: Live: distill auto on grounded high-signal file_change -> status approved, recallable; contradiction of a seeded decision -> pending; path-less command -> pending; recall shows 'Team memory: ... (fixed 2026-06-11 · mcp/kernel.ts)' with no confidence/why-matched; prompt-context shows 'N verified team memories above — follow them' with no token number. npm test 352 + 12 dogfood pass; tsc clean.
